title: Chronon3D Per-Node Stats Report v1
description: Canonical schema for the --stats-json output of `chronon3d_cli render` and `chronon3d_cli bench` (parallel precedent: docs/schemas/chronon3d.bench.v3.schema.json). Emitted by NodeStatsReporter per the spec of TICKET-PERF-COUNTERS-NODE-MEMORY-V1; structured as a per-session aggregate of per-node NodeMemoryMetrics snapshots.

session_id.description: Unique per-session identifier (UUIDv4 recommended) so concurrent sessions in CI logs do not collide.

frame_count.description: Number of frames aggregated into this report (the per-node totals span frame_count sessions of execute_single_node()).

timestamp_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp at the moment the NodeStatsReporter was snapshotted (i.e. session end for serialize-to-file mode).

machine_class.description: Optional. Reference machine class (per configs/benchmark_machines.yaml); useful when the stats report is committed alongside bench baselines for cross-machine comparison.

nodes.description: Per-node aggregate of NodeMemoryMetrics.  Each entry is identified by node_id (the node name as exposed by chronon3d::graph::RenderGraphNode::name()).

pixels_read.description: Total pixels read by this node across the session (frame_count frames).

pixels_written.description: Total pixels written by this node across the session.

bytes_read.description: Total bytes read by this node across the session.

bytes_written.description: Total bytes written by this node across the session.

framebuffer_copies.description: Total framebuffer copy operations (incl. partial-tile copies) emitted by this node.

framebuffer_clears.description: Total framebuffer clear operations emitted by this node.

allocations.description: Total bytes allocated by this node.

temporary_buffers.description: Total temporary framebuffer-shaped buffers allocated/released by this node.
